criteria.name: constitution_read
criteria.description: Agent reads the project constitution and implementation profile before starting work

criteria.name: failing_test_first
criteria.description: Agent writes a failing test before writing implementation code for each micro-task

criteria.name: test_failure_verified
criteria.description: Agent runs the test and confirms it fails (RED phase) before writing implementation

criteria.name: raw_proof_provided
criteria.description: Agent provides raw terminal output as proof of test results, not just assertions like 'tests pass'

criteria.name: serial_execution
criteria.description: Agent does not attempt to start another feature before completing this one

criteria.name: solution_walkthrough
criteria.description: Agent creates a cumulative solution walkthrough document with verification evidence

criteria.name: issue_closure
criteria.description: Agent closes the GitHub issue with a traceability comment linking to the solution walkthrough
